name: Microwave Rocky Road Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large microwave-safe bowl, combine confectioners sugar, butter, cocoa, milk, and salt.
2. Microwave on high power for 2 to 2-1/2 minutes, or until the butter is melted.
3. Add pecans, marshmallows, and vanilla; stir until well blended.
4. Pour into an 8-inch square pan lined with greased aluminum foil.
5. Refrigerate about 1 hour or until firm.
6. Cut into 1-inch squares and store in an airtight container.
Yield: About 1-1/2 pounds fudge.
